18-30.regional_peculiarities: High preference for sitting outdoors for hours. Cafe-hopping is a popular hobby. Strongly support local Izmir roasters (e.g. Awake, Coffeetopia, local boutique cafes) over massive multinational chains like Starbucks.
18-30.seasonal_shift: Strong transition to cold iced coffees starting from April through November.

31-45.regional_peculiarities: High affinity for Turkish coffee served with local mastic gum (damla sakızlı) or local Aegean double-roasted beans. Appreciate the ritual of coffee, slow conversations, and outdoor garden cafes. Price is secondary to bean quality and clean roasting practices.
31-45.seasonal_shift: Appreciate specialty warm brews year-round but drink iced pour-overs in peak summer.

18-30.regional_peculiarities: Coffee is primarily functional for studying/working or a status symbol to be carried around. High density of chain cafes (Starbucks, Espressolab, Kahve Dünyası). High adoption of mobile preorder apps.
18-30.seasonal_shift: Constant demand for iced and blended sweet drinks; quick conversion based on social media viral menus.

31-45.regional_peculiarities: Corporate warriors drinking high-caffeine espresso-based drinks to sustain long hours. They use high-end home espresso machines (Nespresso, Sage, Delonghi) and appreciate specialty beans delivered via premium subscriptions.
31-45.seasonal_shift: Consistent hot beverage consumption; iced beverages used as quick mid-afternoon refreshers.

18-30.regional_peculiarities: Aegean youth prefer light colors, loose fits, and breathable organic fabrics. Vintage shopping and thrift stores are highly popular.
18-30.seasonal_shift: Extended summer wear; heavy winter clothing is rarely purchased.

18-30.regional_peculiarities: High emphasis on matching global trends immediately. Brand logos are visible. Highly competitive dressing for social events and workspace environments.
18-30.seasonal_shift: Clear 4-season wardrobe transitions with significant spending on autumn/winter jackets and boots.
